title: GLM-5.2 + OpenDesign: SOTA CHEAP DESIGN SYSTEM! This is AWESOME!
summary: GLM-5.2 is an open model for UI generation combined with OpenDesign, a design system framework, to generate high-quality HTML and CSS UI prototypes including landing pages, dashboards, and mobile app interfaces. The video demonstrates setup through desktop app, source installation, and Docker deployment.
writeup: The video demonstrates pairing GLM-5.2 with OpenDesign to generate UI prototypes, including landing pages, dashboards, and mobile app interfaces. The workflow outputs polished HTML and CSS artifacts with consistent design properties across the generated screens. It also covers OpenDesign installation paths: a desktop app, building from source, and Docker. The focus is a low-cost design system for producing front-end mockups.
